hero.slogan: The comfort of your home is our job.
hero.description: Household services and general renovation works

plumbing.title: Plumbing
description: We perform plumbing work of any type and complexity.
Installation, repair, and replacement of sinks, faucets, pipes, valves, toilets, and showers.
Pipe installation and dismantling, sewer blockage removal.

electricity.title: Electrical Services
description: We carry out all types of electrical work quickly and with high quality.
Installation and replacement of chandeliers, sockets, switches, lamps, breakers, fans, and LED lights.

doors_windows.title: Doors and Windows
description: Installation, repair, and adjustment of wooden, metal, and plastic doors and windows.
Lock replacement, handle installation, glass replacement, mechanism repair, insulation improvement.

furniture_cleaning.title: Furniture Cleaning
description: Deep cleaning of upholstered furniture on-site.
Stain removal, odor elimination, hygienic disinfection using safe materials.

furniture_repair.title: Furniture Repair
description: Repair and replacement of furniture mechanisms.
Adjustment of doors, hinges, guides, and restoration of surfaces.

carpet_cleaning.title: Carpet Cleaning
description: Removal of stains and odors, color refresh, fiber preservation.

boiler_repair.title: Boiler Repair
description: Diagnostics and repair of gas and electric boilers.

ac_cleaning.title: Air Conditioner Cleaning
description: Cleaning of internal and external AC units.
Filter washing, disinfection, gas check, and efficiency optimization.

quality_assurance.title: Fast Response
quality_assurance.contact: Call us and trust your home to professionals.

items.title: Experienced Professionals
items.description: Skilled craftsmen with years of experience in various fields.

items.title: High-Quality Work
items.description: We use reliable materials and ensure excellent results.

items.title: Fast and timely execution
items.description: We complete all work within the agreed deadlines.

items.title: Full-Service Solutions
items.description: Renovation, electrical, plumbing, painting, and more.

items.title: Individual Approach
items.description: Every project is handled according to the client’s needs.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are here to help you. Reach out anytime and we’ll respond soon.
